title: polystichum conjunctum
intro: Polystichum conjunctum, also known as the jointed fern or two-jointed fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Polystichum. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum conjunctum include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage. Polystichum conjunctum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
